name: Omni-Service AWS Red Team Operation (Full Spectrum)
description: Exhaustive testing framework covering all AWSServiceType entities. Includes automated scanning (Prowler/Nuclei), exploitation (Pacu), and manual API testing (Burp Suite).

test_cases.name: SSM Parameter Store Harvesting
test_cases.description: Iterate through SSM Parameter Store to identify and decrypt sensitive configuration secrets.

steps.title: Recursive Parameter Dump
steps.description: List all parameters recursively from the root.

steps.title: Decryption Test
steps.description: Attempt to decrypt SecureString parameters using the current IAM principal.

test_cases.name: SSM Run Command Lateral Movement
test_cases.description: Abuse ssm:SendCommand to execute payloads on managed instances without SSH access.

steps.title: Command Injection
steps.description: Execute a reverse shell payload on all targets accessible via SSM.

test_cases.name: Lambda API Injection (Burp Suite)
test_cases.description: Test Lambda-backed API Gateway endpoints for injection vulnerabilities using Burp.

steps.title: Proxy Interception
steps.description: Configure browser to route traffic through Burp. Intercept valid request.

steps.title: SQLi Fuzzing
steps.description: Send request to Intruder. Fuzz JSON parameters with SQL Injection list.

test_cases.name: CloudFront Cache Poisoning (Burp Suite)
test_cases.description: Identify unkeyed headers in CloudFront to poison the cache.

steps.title: Param Miner Scan
steps.description: Run Burp Suite Extension 'Param Miner' to identify hidden headers supported by the origin.

steps.title: Poison Cache
steps.description: Inject malicious X-Forwarded-Host to redirect JS loads to attacker domain.

test_cases.name: EC2 Security Posture Audit
test_cases.description: Run Prowler specifically against EC2 resources to check for open ports and unencrypted volumes.

steps.title: Prowler EC2 Scan
steps.description: Execute Prowler check group for EC2.

test_cases.name: EC2 IMDSv1 Credential Theft
test_cases.description: Exploit SSRF or shell access to steal IAM role credentials via IMDSv1.

steps.title: Extract Role Name
steps.description: Query meta-data for the security credentials path.

test_cases.name: S3 Public Bucket Discovery
test_cases.description: Use S3Scanner to identify if the bucket is readable/writable by 'AllUsers'.

steps.title: S3Scanner Run
steps.description: Scan the specific bucket URL.

test_cases.name: S3 Mass Exfiltration (Sync)
test_cases.description: Exfiltrate all data from the bucket using high-performance sync.

steps.title: AWS CLI Sync
steps.description: Download all objects to local loot directory.

test_cases.name: RDS Configuration Audit
test_cases.description: Use ScoutSuite logic to verify encryption at rest and public accessibility.

steps.title: Public Snapshot Check
steps.description: Identify snapshots shared with the public.

test_cases.name: IAM Privilege Escalation (Pacu)
test_cases.description: Automated detection of privilege escalation paths using Pacu.

steps.title: Pacu PrivEsc
steps.description: Execute the iam__privesc_scan module.

test_cases.name: EKS Cluster Penetration (Kube-hunter)
test_cases.description: Active penetration testing of the EKS API endpoint.

steps.title: Run Kube-hunter
steps.description: Scan the cluster endpoint for CVEs and misconfigurations.

test_cases.name: ELB Vulnerability Scan (Nuclei)
test_cases.description: Scan Load Balancer DNS for web vulnerabilities.

steps.title: Nuclei Scan
steps.description: Run AWS technology templates against the ELB DNS.

test_cases.name: DynamoDB Full Table Exfiltration
test_cases.description: Perform a full table scan to dump database content.

steps.title: Scan Table
steps.description: Dump all items to JSON output.

test_cases.name: SNS Topic Spam / Phishing
test_cases.description: Publish unauthorized messages to public or shared SNS topics.

steps.title: Publish Message
steps.description: Broadcast message to all subscribers.

test_cases.name: SQS Malicious Payload Injection
test_cases.description: Inject malicious payloads into queues to attack downstream workers.

steps.title: Send Message
steps.description: Inject JSON payload with known exploit strings.

test_cases.name: VPC Reachability Analysis
test_cases.description: Audit Network ACLs and Security Groups for wide open ingress.

steps.title: Check 0.0.0.0/0
steps.description: Filter Security Groups for 0.0.0.0/0 on port 22 or 3389.

test_cases.name: Lex Bot Policy Audit
test_cases.description: Ensure Lex bots do not have resource policies allowing public access.

steps.title: List Bot Policies
steps.description: Retrieve resource-based policies for bots.
